_doc: Whalesborough Stripe Products bootstrap payload. Each object is a Stripe API request body for POST /v1/products. Idempotent on metadata.internal_sku (the create script must lookup existing and call products.update if found). Field 'tax_code' must be one of the codes listed in stripe-config.md §2.3. Created: 2026-05-14.

products._note: Remaining accommodation Products follow the same pattern. Truncated for brevity; the bootstrap script iterates the units.json file. Add bespoke-01 and bespoke-02 last (highest-value, two-bedroom-plus).
